command: make test-unit (cd app && npx vitest run)

lint.detail: No ESLint config exists anywhere under app/ (confirmed: no .eslintrc*, no eslint devDependency, no eslintConfig key in package.json). package.json's "lint" script ("next lint") would prompt interactively to scaffold a config on first run - not invoked as a baseline gate for this reason, consistent with architecture.md's own note that no ESLint config exists.

typecheck.detail: No dedicated Makefile/package.json typecheck script exists; ran the project's own installed typescript (5.9.3) directly against tsconfig.json (strict: true, noEmit: true). Zero errors at baseline.
